---
title: "Refactor HF"
output: html_document
date: "2026-02-06"
params:
  fac_file: "..."
  fdr_file: "..."
  gpkg_file: "..."
  out_file: "..."
  split_flines_meters: ...
  collapse_flines_meters: ...
  collapse_flines_main_meters: ...
  simplify_tolerance_m: ...
---

```{r}
Sys.setenv(GDAL_SQLITE_LOAD_EXTENSIONS = "YES")
```

```{r}
Sys.getenv("DYLD_LIBRARY_PATH")
Sys.getenv("GDAL_SQLITE_LOAD_EXTENSIONS")
```

```{r}
library(sf)
library(hfrefactor)
```

```{r}
sf::sf_extSoftVersion()  # Check versions first
```

```{r}
Sys.setenv(CPL_DEBUG = "ON")
```

```{r}
refactor(
  gpkg      = params$gpkg_file,
  fac       = params$fac_file,
  fdr       = params$fdr_file,
  outfile   = params$out_file,
  split_flines_meters = as.numeric(params$split_flines_meters),
  collapse_flines_meters      = as.numeric(params$collapse_flines_meters),
  collapse_flines_main_meters = as.numeric(params$collapse_flines_main_meters),
  simplify_tolerance_m        = as.numeric(params$simplify_tolerance_m)
)
```
